3103070.name: Breakers
3103070.description: This game is a hip-hop breaking dance game that captures the vibrant energy and creativity of dance battles. In this turn-based game, two players compete in intense dance battles, each having 60 seconds to perform their moves and earn points. This game combines the dynamics of breaking dance with the strategy of a turn-based game, providing a unique and engaging experience that challenges players to showcase their dance skills and strategic thinking.
3103070.supported_languages:
葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
